title: Price's Candles - Altar Candle - 100mm x 80mm - Unscented - Up To 50 Hour Burn Time - Smokeless & Dripless
features: PRICE'S ALTAR CANDLES - Price's unscented, solid wax altar candles are made from the highest quality wax to deliver a bright, clean, smokeless and non-drip burn.

PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS - Our off-white candles are perfect for dinner dates, parties, Churches, weddings, Christmas and many other special occasions! These pillar candles are perfect for adding glamour and lighting up your home and garden.

UNSCENTED & DRIPLESS - Made from high-quality wax, our altar candles are unscented, smokeless and dripless! These tapered candles keep your home clean from fumes and strong smells - ideal for everyday use.

PRICE'S - Price's are passionate about providing high-quality, long-lasting candles. We know the difference candles can make to your mood and home, that's why we continue to expand our collections and provide reliable, quality candles.
100% MONEY BACK GUARANTEE - In the unlikely event that you are unhappy with your altar candles, we will provide you with a full refund in accordance with Amazon terms.
description: Product Description Our unscented solid wax altar candles are made from the highest quality wax to deliver a bright, clean, smokeless and non-drip burn. This off-white pillar candle is perfect for adding glamour to weddings and for lighting up your home and garden. Safety Warning Keys the candle far from flammable materials. Do not burn a candle unaccompanied. Monitor the burn time. Process candle residues safely.
